basics.billingTimingHelp: Advance billing invoices the upcoming period at the start of each cycle.

cadenceOwner.description: Choose which schedule defines this recurring line's service periods.
cadenceOwner.label: Cadence Owner

client.description: Use the client billing calendar so this recurring line stays aligned with the client's normal invoice cadence.
client.label: Invoice on client billing schedule

contract.description: Use this contract line's own anniversary dates. Contract cadence currently supports monthly, quarterly, semi-annual, and annual recurring billing.
contract.label: Invoice on contract anniversary

afterHours.tooltip: Apply a multiplier to the standard hourly rate for work performed outside of defined business hours (requires Business Hours configuration).

overtime.tooltip: Apply a different rate when total hours worked within the contract line's billing period exceed a specified threshold.

options.advance: Advance - invoice at the start of the period
options.arrears: Arrears - invoice after the period closes

basics.description: Create a reusable template that can be quickly added to contracts or contract templates. Define the billing model, services, and default rates that will be copied when this preset is used.
basics.heading: Contract Line Preset Basics

fixed.description: Charge a flat amount every billing period.
fixed.title: Fixed Fee

hourly.description: Bill based on approved time entries and hourly overlays.
hourly.title: Hourly

usage.description: Invoice for units consumed such as devices or licenses.
usage.title: Usage-Based

billingModel.description: Select the billing behavior that fits this offering. Services and overlays can be attached once the line exists.
billingModel.heading: Choose a Billing Model *

timingHelp.fixed: Advance billing invoices the upcoming period at the cycle start.
timingHelp.nonFixed: Hourly and usage-based lines always bill in arrears.

errors.saveFailed: Failed to save contract line preset

fixed.adjustForPartialPeriodsHelp: When enabled, the recurring fee scales to the covered portion of a service period when the contract starts or ends inside that period.
fixed.alertBody: The contract line's base rate is the billed amount. You can also attach products here; product quantities are billed as units, while fixed-fee service quantities are used for tax allocation only.
fixed.baseRateHelp: Suggested recurring fee for all fixed services. Can be overridden when adding this preset to a contract.
fixed.description: Set up services that are billed at a fixed recurring rate, regardless of usage.
fixed.emptyState: No fixed fee items added yet. Click "Add Item" above to get started.
fixed.heading: Fixed Fee Services

hourly.alertBody: These services are billed based on actual time tracked. Each time entry will be multiplied by the hourly rate to calculate the invoice amount.
hourly.description: Configure services that are billed based on time tracked. Perfect for T&M (Time & Materials) work.
hourly.emptyState: No hourly services added yet. Click "Add Hourly Service" above to get started.
hourly.heading: Hourly Services
hourly.minimumBillableTimeHelp: e.g., 15 minutes - any time entry less than this will be rounded up
hourly.roundUpToNearestHelp: e.g., 15 minutes - time entries will be rounded up to the nearest interval

usage.alertBody: These services are billed based on actual consumption or usage metrics. Each unit consumed will be multiplied by the unit rate to calculate the invoice amount.
usage.description: Configure services that are billed based on usage or consumption.
usage.emptyState: No usage-based services added yet. Click "Add Usage-Based Service" above to get started.
usage.heading: Usage-Based Services

validation.fixedServiceRequired: At least one fixed service or product is required
validation.hourlyServiceRequired: At least one hourly service is required
validation.nameRequired: Contract line preset name is required
validation.unitOfMeasureRequired: Service {{index}}: Unit of measure is required
validation.usageServiceRequired: At least one usage-based service is required

tooltips.allowRollover: If checked, unused {{units}} from one period can be used in the next.
tooltips.overageRatePerUnit: The rate charged for each {{unit}} used beyond the included amount. (e.g., $)
tooltips.totalInBucket: The total number of {{units}} included in this bucket per billing period.

errors.quantityGreaterThanZero: Quantity must be greater than zero

editQuantity.heading: Adjust Quantity
editQuantity.helperText: Leave blank to use the product catalog price for this contract's currency.

tooltips.hourlyRate: The standard rate charged per hour for this service.
tooltips.minimumBillableTime: The minimum duration (in minutes) that will be billed for any time entry, regardless of actual duration.
tooltips.roundUpToNearest: Time entries will be rounded up to the nearest specified minute interval (e.g., 15 minutes). Set to 1 or 0 to disable rounding.

userTypeRates.heading: User Type Specific Rates
userTypeRates.tooltip: Define different hourly rates for specific user types working on this service. These override the service's default hourly rate.

validation.duplicateType: This user type already has a specific rate.
validation.selectTypeAndRate: Please select a user type and enter a valid non-negative rate.

tierEditor.helperText: Define usage ranges and their corresponding rates. Leave 'To' blank for the last tier to represent unlimited usage. The first tier must start from 0. Tiers must be contiguous.

tooltips.defaultRatePerUnit: Rate per unit (used if tiered pricing is off).

descriptions.fixed: A fixed-price contract line with consistent billing regardless of usage. Ideal for predictable services.
descriptions.hourly: Time-based billing with configurable rates. Best for variable workloads billed by time spent.
descriptions.usage: Usage-based billing with tiered pricing options. Perfect for services measured by consumption.
